summary: Ultra‑crispy soundboard capture of a midsummer ’84 show highlighted by an epic Dark Star and the scorching Scarlet > Touch > Fire.
review: The recording is praised as an “ultra crispy board” with crystal‑clear AUD that makes the mid‑80s energy jump right off the speakers.  Fans repeatedly cite a soaring Dark Star, the blistering Scarlet > Touch > Fire sequence and inspired moments from Space and Stella Blue, making this one of the era’s most beloved performances.

ai_rating.rationale: All but one review are 5‑star, with consistent praise for both the musical performance and the pristine soundboard recording; only minor taper‑related gripe noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call it “ultra crispy board”, “great AUD”, and note amazing clarity, no reported drop‑outs or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy midsummer show with a magical Dark Star and a blistering Scarlet>Touch>Fire that keep the momentum rolling; overall vibe described as inspired and unforgettable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly hailed as “the greatest guitarist”, with perfect tone on Dark Star and overall magical playing.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned only in passing (saw Phil Lesh at a later benefit), no specific performance comment.
